since_last: 34% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.31%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.21% · BTC +2.47% · Gold +1.72% · Nasdaq100 -1.48%. 34% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.31%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.31%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.59%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +12.33%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +12.33%, ISRG +4.40%, AAPL +3.99%, ADBE +3.84%, ADBE +3.84%. Laggards: TER -11.06%, KLAC -9.94%, CEVA -8.70%, MRVL -8.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.35% at $158.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
